mapper.select: SELECT n.id, n.title, n.content, n.type, n.status, n.pinned, u.full_name AS posted_by_name, TO_CHAR(n.published_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS published_at, TO_CHAR(n.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at FROM notices n LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = n.posted_by WHERE n.id = #{id} AND n.delete_flg = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notices (title, content, type, status, pinned, posted_by, created_at, published_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{status}, #{pinned}, #{postedBy}, NOW(), NOW() NULL)
mapper.update: UPDATE notices SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, type = #{type}, status = #{status}, pinned = #{pinned}, updated_at = NOW() , published_at = COALESCE(published_at, NOW()) WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flg = 0
UPDATE notices SET status = 'PUBLISHED', published_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flg = 0
UPDATE notices SET delete_flg = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
